A [[Rebel Platform]] in orbit above the planet [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], '''''Kothlis II''''' served as the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] outpost in the system. The platform was defended by a [[Golan space defense platform]] called [[Sentinel (Golan defense platform)|''Sentinel'']] and a squadron of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

After the Rebels succeeded in capturing a secret Imperial supercomputer being transported on the freighter ''[[Suprosa]]'' from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], the computer was taken to Kothlis for decoding. The Imperials were able to track it, however, and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] was dispatched to Kothlis by the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]], personally, to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who was being held prisoner on the planet by a group of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], as well as to make it seem as if the Empire was genuinely concerned with the loss of the computer. The [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], along with the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] appeared in system to portray the ruse.

Resulting was the [[Battle of Kothlis]], in which both ''Kothlis II'' and the ''Sentinel'' were destroyed in the attack, though the supercomputer was secured and delivered to [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]], who later determined it to be holding the secret plans to the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]], still under construction over the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].

However, by [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the station had apparently been rebuilt, and housed [[Kyp's Dozen]] in the time prior to the [[Battle of Fondor]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' the protaganist [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was sent by Darth Vader in the [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']] to capture a [[XQ5 Platform|XQ5 platform]] that was called ''Kothlis II''. This platform was defended by Rebel starfighters piloted by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] and the computer was transferred to an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvette]] called ''[[Timoth 4]]'' rather than the [[Razor (CR90 corvette)|Razor]]. In that game, the station is captured and not destroyed.
